nodes.name: Clinical Concept Library
nodes.description: This model creates one record per value set member, but it includes relevant fields for each value set member taken from the clnical_concepts and coding_systems tables.

nodes.name: Condition
nodes.description: The core condition table contains information related to medical  conditions patients have, including problems, admitting diagnosis codes,  and billable diagnosis codes.

columns.name: condition_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each condition in the table.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: member_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular insurance product or health plan. A patient can have more than one member_id because they can have more than one insurance product/plan.

columns.name: patient_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular clinical source system.

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each encounter in the dataset.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for a claim. Each claim represents a distinct healthcare service or set of services provided to a patient.

columns.name: recorded_date
columns.description: Date when the condition was recorded.

columns.name: onset_date
columns.description: Date when the condition first occurred.

columns.name: resolved_date
columns.description: Date when the condition was resolved.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Status of the record (e.g., condition, test, etc).

columns.name: condition_type
columns.description: The type of condition i.e. problem, admitting, or billing.

columns.name: source_code_type
columns.description: The type of code reported in the source system (e.g., ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)

columns.name: source_code
columns.description: The code in the source system (e.g., the ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: source_description
columns.description: Description of the source code in the source system.

columns.name: normalized_code_type
columns.description: The normalized type of code.

columns.name: normalized_code
columns.description: The normalized code.
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: normalized_description
columns.description: Normalized description of the code.

columns.name: mapping_method
columns.description: mapping method used to populate the normalized codes and descriptions.  Can be manual (fields were populated in input layer), automatic (dictionary codes matching the source code were found and was automatically populated) or custom (populated by normalization engine)

columns.name: condition_rank
columns.description: The numerical ranking of the condition. For conditions derived from medical claims, condition_rank is set from the diagnosis code position on the claim, so diagnosis_code_1 becomes condition_rank = 1, diagnosis_code_2 becomes condition_rank = 2, and so on through diagnosis_code_25. For conditions sourced from the input layer condition table, this field is passed through without transformation from the mapped input value. A condition_rank of 1 indicates a primary diagnosis code, and any condition_rank greater than 1 indicates a secondary diagnosis code.

columns.name: present_on_admit_code
columns.description: The present_on_admit_code related to the condition.

columns.name: present_on_admit_description
columns.description: The description of the present_on_admit_code for the condition.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: Medical Claim
nodes.description: The medical claim table contains information on services rendered to patients and billed by the provider to the insurer as claims.

columns.name: medical_claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each row in the table.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for a claim. Each claim represents a distinct healthcare service or set of services provided to a patient.

columns.name: claim_line_number
columns.description: Indicates the line number for the particular line of the claim.

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each encounter in the dataset.

columns.name: encounter_type
columns.description: Indicates the type of encounter e.g. acute inpatient, emergency department, etc.

columns.name: encounter_group
columns.description: Categorization of the encounter into groups based on predefined criteria.

columns.name: claim_type
columns.description: Indicates whether the claim is professional (CMS-1500), institutional (UB-04), dental, or vision.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: member_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular insurance product or health plan. A patient can have more than one member_id because they can have more than one insurance product/plan.

columns.name: payer
columns.description: Name of the payer (i.e. health insurer) providing coverage.

columns.name: plan
columns.description: Name of the plan (i.e. sub contract) providing coverage.

columns.name: claim_start_date
columns.description: The date when the healthcare service was provided. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: claim_end_date
columns.description: End date for the claim.

columns.name: claim_line_start_date
columns.description: Start date for the claim line.

columns.name: claim_line_end_date
columns.description: End date for the claim line.

columns.name: admission_date
columns.description: Admission date for the claim (inpatient claims only).

columns.name: discharge_date
columns.description: Discharge date for the claim (inpatient claims only).

columns.name: service_category_1
columns.description: The broader service category this claim belongs to.

columns.name: service_category_2
columns.description: The more specific service category this claim belongs to.

columns.name: service_category_3
columns.description: The most specific service category this claim belongs to.

columns.name: admit_source_code
columns.description: Indicates where the patient was before the healthcare encounter (inpatient claims only).

columns.name: admit_source_description
columns.description: Description of the admit_source_code for the encounter.

columns.name: admit_type_code
columns.description: Indicates the type of admission (inpatient claims only).

columns.name: admit_type_description
columns.description: Description of the admit_type_code for the encounter.

columns.name: discharge_disposition_code
columns.description: Indicates the type of setting the patient was discharged to (institutional inpatient claims only).

columns.name: discharge_disposition_description
columns.description: Description of the discharge_disposition_code for the encounter.

columns.name: place_of_service_code
columns.description: Place of service for the claim (professional claims only).

columns.name: place_of_service_description
columns.description: Place of service description.

columns.name: bill_type_code
columns.description: Bill type code for the claim (institutional claims only).

columns.name: bill_type_description
columns.description: Bill type description.

columns.name: drg_code_type
columns.description: The DRG system used for the claim.

columns.name: drg_code
columns.description: The DRG code on the claim.

columns.name: drg_description
columns.description: The description for the DRG code used on the claim.

columns.name: revenue_center_code
columns.description: Revenue center code for the claim line (institutional only and typically multiple codes per claim).

columns.name: revenue_center_description
columns.description: Revenue center description.

columns.name: service_unit_quantity
columns.description: The number of units for the particular revenue center code.

columns.name: hcpcs_code
columns.description: The CPT or HCPCS code representing the procedure or service provided. These codes are used to describe medical, surgical, and diagnostic services.

columns.name: hcpcs_modifier_1
columns.description: 1st modifier for HCPCS code.

columns.name: hcpcs_modifier_2
columns.description: 2nd modifier for HCPCS code.

columns.name: hcpcs_modifier_3
columns.description: 3rd modifier for HCPCS code.

columns.name: hcpcs_modifier_4
columns.description: 4th modifier for HCPCS code.

columns.name: hcpcs_modifier_5
columns.description: 5th modifier for HCPCS code.

columns.name: rendering_npi
columns.description: Rendering NPI for the claim (typically represents the physician or entity providing services).
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: rendering_tin
columns.description: Rendering provider tax identification number (TIN).

columns.name: rendering_name
columns.description: Rendering provider name.

columns.name: billing_npi
columns.description: Billing NPI for the claim (typically represents organization billing the claim).
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: billing_tin
columns.description: Billing provider tax identification number (TIN).

columns.name: billing_name
columns.description: Billing provider name.

columns.name: facility_npi
columns.description: Facility NPI for the claim (the organizational NPI of the facility where services were performed).
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: facility_name
columns.description: Facility name.

columns.name: paid_date
columns.description: The date the claim was paid.

columns.name: paid_amount
columns.description: The total amount paid by the insurer.

columns.name: allowed_amount
columns.description: The total amount allowed (includes amount paid by the insurer and patient).

columns.name: charge_amount
columns.description: The total amount charged for the services provided, before any adjustments or payments. This is typically in US dollars.

columns.name: coinsurance_amount
columns.description: The total coinsurance charged on the claim by the provider.

columns.name: copayment_amount
columns.description: The total copayment charged on the claim by the provider.

columns.name: deductible_amount
columns.description: The total deductible charged on the claim by the provider.

columns.name: total_cost_amount
columns.description: The total amount paid on the claim by different parties.

columns.name: in_network_flag
columns.description: Flag indicating if the claim was in or out of network.

columns.name: enrollment_flag
columns.description: Flag indicating if the claim has corresponding enrollment during the same time period the service occurred.

columns.name: member_month_key
columns.description: The unique combination of person_id, year_month, payer, plan, and data source.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: file_date
columns.description: The date associated with the claims file, typically reflecting the reporting period of the claims data.

columns.name: ingest_datetime
columns.description: The date and time the source file was ingested into the data warehouse or landed in cloud storage.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

columns.name: city

columns.name: state

columns.name: latitude

columns.name: longitude

columns.name: ethnicity

columns.name: age
columns.description: The age of the patient calculated based on their date of birth and the last time the tuva project was run.

nodes.description: CMS generated grouping of ICD 10 codes into chronic conditions groups

columns.name: condition_id

columns.name: condition

columns.name: condition_column_name
columns.description: Column name for the chronic condition

columns.description: Type of chronic condition

columns.description: Additional logic for the chronic condition

columns.description: Claims qualification criteria for the chronic condition

nodes.name: cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__condition
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
   )
}}

select
      claim_id
    , person_id
    , recorded_date
    , normalized_code_type
    , normalized_code
    , data_source
    , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('core__condition') }}
where claim_id is not null

nodes.name: cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__medical_claim
cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__patient
cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__pharmacy_claim
cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__procedure
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
   )
}}

select
      claim_id
    , person_id
    , procedure_date
    , normalized_code_type
    , normalized_code
    , data_source
    , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('core__procedure') }}
where claim_id is not null

nodes.name: tuva_chronic_conditions__stg_core__condition
chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_all
nodes.description: This model contains logic for all chronic conditions where additional_logic is not 'None'. This model includes standard exclusions and maps ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes, ICD-10-PCS procedure codes, HCPCS codes, and MS DRG codes to chronic conditions.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
   )
}}

with chronic_conditions as (

    select * from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_hierarchy') }}

)

, patient_conditions as (

    select
          person_id
        , claim_id
        , recorded_date as start_date
        , normalized_code_type as code_type
        , replace(normalized_code, '.', '') as code
        , data_source
    from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__condition') }}

)

, patient_ms_drgs as (

    select
          person_id
        , claim_id
        , claim_start_date as start_date
        , drg_code_type as drg_code_type
        , drg_code as code
        , data_source
    from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__medical_claim') }}
    where drg_code_type = 'ms-drg'

)

, patient_procedures as (

    select
          person_id
        , claim_id
        , procedure_date as start_date
        , normalized_code_type as code_type
        , replace(normalized_code, '.', '') as code
        , data_source
    from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__procedure') }}

)

, inclusions_diagnosis as (

    select
          patient_conditions.person_id
        , patient_conditions.claim_id
        , patient_conditions.start_date
        , patient_conditions.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_conditions
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_conditions.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'ICD-10-CM'
    and chronic_conditions.additional_logic = 'None'

)

, inclusions_ms_drg as (

    select
          patient_ms_drgs.person_id
        , patient_ms_drgs.claim_id
        , patient_ms_drgs.start_date
        , patient_ms_drgs.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_ms_drgs
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_ms_drgs.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'MS-DRG'
    and chronic_conditions.additional_logic = 'None'

)

, inclusions_procedure as (

    select
          patient_procedures.person_id
        , patient_procedures.claim_id
        , patient_procedures.start_date
        , patient_procedures.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_procedures
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_procedures.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system in ('ICD-10-PCS', 'HCPCS')
    and chronic_conditions.additional_logic = 'None'

)

, exclusions_diagnosis as (

    select distinct
          patient_conditions.claim_id
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_conditions
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_conditions.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Exclude'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'ICD-10-CM'

)

{% if target.type == 'fabric' %}
, inclusions_unioned as (

    select * from inclusions_diagnosis
    union
    select * from inclusions_procedure
    union
    select * from inclusions_ms_drg

)
{% else %}
, inclusions_unioned as (

    select * from inclusions_diagnosis
    union distinct
    select * from inclusions_procedure
    union distinct
    select * from inclusions_ms_drg

)
{% endif %}

select distinct
      cast(inclusions_unioned.person_id as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as person_id
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.claim_id as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as claim_id
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.start_date as date) as start_date
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.chronic_condition_type as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as chronic_condition_type
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.condition_category as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as condition_category
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.condition as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as condition
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.data_source as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as data_source
    , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from inclusions_unioned
     left outer join exclusions_diagnosis
         on inclusions_unioned.claim_id = exclusions_diagnosis.claim_id
         and inclusions_unioned.condition = exclusions_diagnosis.condition
where exclusions_diagnosis.claim_id is null

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique ID for the patient.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each claim.

columns.name: start_date
columns.description: Start date of the chronic condition derived from diagnosis, procedure, or medication.

columns.name: chronic_condition_type
columns.description: The type of chronic condition as defined by CMS. ('Common' or 'Other chronic or potentially disabling conditions')

columns.name: condition_category
columns.description: The category of the condition (e.g. Cardiovascular Disease).

columns.name: condition
columns.description: The name of the chronic condition.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: Indicates the name of the source dataset (e.g. Medicare Claims).

nodes.name: chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_hiv_aids
nodes.description: This model contains logic for the chronic condition Human Immunodeficiency Virus and/or Acquired Immunodeficiency Syndrome (HIV/AIDS). This model maps ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes and MS DRG codes to the chronic condition.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
   )
}}

{%- set condition_filter = 'Human Immunodeficiency Virus and/or Acquired Immunodeficiency Syndrome (HIV/AIDS)' -%}

with chronic_conditions as (

    select * from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_hierarchy') }}
    where condition = '{{ condition_filter }}'

)

, patient_conditions as (

    select
          person_id
        , claim_id
        , recorded_date as start_date
        , normalized_code_type as code_type
        , replace(normalized_code, '.', '') as code
        , data_source
    from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__condition') }}

)

, patient_ms_drgs as (

    select
          person_id
        , claim_id
        , claim_start_date as start_date
        , drg_code_type as drg_code_type
        , drg_code as code
        , data_source
    from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__medical_claim') }}
    where
        drg_code_type = 'ms-drg'

)

/*
    Exception logic: a claim with the diagnosis code R75 requires a second
    qualifying claim that is not R75 (a screening code)

    This CTE excludes encounters with the exception code. Those encounters
    will be evaluated separately.
*/
, inclusions_diagnosis as (

    select
          patient_conditions.person_id
        , patient_conditions.claim_id
        , patient_conditions.start_date
        , patient_conditions.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_conditions
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_conditions.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'ICD-10-CM'
    and chronic_conditions.code <> 'R75'

)

, inclusions_ms_drg as (

    select
          patient_ms_drgs.person_id
        , patient_ms_drgs.claim_id
        , patient_ms_drgs.start_date
        , patient_ms_drgs.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_ms_drgs
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_ms_drgs.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'MS-DRG'

)

/*
    Exception logic: a claim with the diagnosis code R75 requires a second
    qualifying claim that is not R75 (a screening code)

    This CTE includes encounters with the exception code only where that
    patient has another encounter that is not R75.
*/
, exception_diagnosis as (

    select
          patient_conditions.person_id
        , patient_conditions.claim_id
        , patient_conditions.start_date
        , patient_conditions.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_conditions
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_conditions.code = chronic_conditions.code
         inner join inclusions_diagnosis
             on patient_conditions.person_id = inclusions_diagnosis.person_id
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'ICD-10-CM'
    and chronic_conditions.code = 'R75'

)

{% if target.type == 'fabric' %}
, inclusions_unioned as (

    select * from inclusions_diagnosis
    union
    select * from inclusions_ms_drg
    union
    select * from exception_diagnosis

)
{% else %}
, inclusions_unioned as (

    select * from inclusions_diagnosis
    union distinct
    select * from inclusions_ms_drg
    union distinct
    select * from exception_diagnosis

)
{% endif %}

select distinct
      cast(inclusions_unioned.person_id as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as person_id
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.claim_id as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as claim_id
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.start_date as date) as start_date
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.chronic_condition_type as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as chronic_condition_type
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.condition_category as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as condition_category
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.condition as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as condition
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.data_source as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as data_source
    , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from inclusions_unioned

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique ID for the patient.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each claim.

columns.name: start_date
columns.description: Start date of the chronic condition derived from diagnosis, procedure, or medication.

columns.name: chronic_condition_type
columns.description: The type of chronic condition as defined by CMS. ('Common' or 'Other chronic or potentially disabling conditions')

columns.name: condition_category
columns.description: The category of the condition (e.g. Other).

columns.name: condition
columns.description: The name of the chronic condition.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: Indicates the name of the source dataset (e.g. Medicare Claims).

nodes.name: chronic_conditions__tuva_chronic_conditions_long
nodes.description: This model creates one record per patient per condition using the tuva chronic conditions hierarchy as the grouper. The model pulls in the first and last date of the diagnosis that flagged the patient for this condition group.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', var('clinical_enabled', False)) | as_bool
   )
}}

with all_conditions as (
select
  person_id
  , normalized_code
  , recorded_date
    from {{ ref('tuva_chronic_conditions__stg_core__condition') }}
)


, conditions_with_first_and_last_diagnosis_date as (
select
  person_id
  , normalized_code as icd_10_cm
  , min(recorded_date) as first_diagnosis_date
  , max(recorded_date) as last_diagnosis_date
from all_conditions
group by person_id, normalized_code

)


select
  aa.person_id
  , bb.concept_name as condition
  , min(first_diagnosis_date) as first_diagnosis_date
  , max(last_diagnosis_date) as last_diagnosis_date
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from conditions_with_first_and_last_diagnosis_date as aa
inner join {{ ref('clinical_concept_library__value_set_member_relevant_fields') }} as bb
on aa.icd_10_cm = bb.code
group by aa.person_id, bb.concept_name

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: The unique identifier for a patient

columns.name: condition
columns.description: The name of the condition that each diagnosis code rolls up to

columns.name: first_diagnosis_date
columns.description: The first date when a diagnosis code that rolls up to this condition was coded to this patient

columns.name: last_diagnosis_date
columns.description: The last date when a diagnosis code that rolls up to this condition was coded to this patient

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The time at which the model was materialized. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_oud
nodes.description: This model contains logic for the chronic condition Opioid Use Disorder  (OUD). This model maps ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes, ICD-10-PCS procedure codes, HCPCS codes, and NDC codes to the chronic condition.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
   )
}}

{%- set condition_filter = 'Opioid Use Disorder (OUD)' -%}

{%- set naltrexone_ndcs = (
    '00056001122', '00056001130', '00056001170', '00056007950', '00056008050',
    '00185003901', '00185003930', '00406009201', '00406009203', '00406117001',
    '00406117003', '00555090201', '00555090202', '00904703604', '16729008101',
    '16729008110', '42291063230', '43063059115', '47335032683', '47335032688',
    '50090286600', '50436010501', '51224020630', '51224020650', '51285027501',
    '51285027502', '52152010502', '52152010504', '52152010530', '54868557400',
    '63459030042', '63629104601', '63629104701', '65694010003', '65694010010',
    '65757030001', '65757030202', '68084029111', '68084029121', '68094085362',
    '68115068030'
    )
-%}

with chronic_conditions as (

    select * from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_hierarchy') }}
    where condition = '{{ condition_filter }}'

)

, patient_conditions as (

    select
          person_id
        , claim_id
        , recorded_date as start_date
        , normalized_code_type as code_type
        , replace(normalized_code, '.', '') as code
        , data_source
    from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__condition') }}

)

, patient_medications as (

    select
          person_id
        , claim_id
        , paid_date as start_date
        , replace(ndc_code, '.', '') as code
        , data_source
    from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__pharmacy_claim') }}

)

, patient_procedures as (

    select
          person_id
        , claim_id
        , procedure_date as start_date
        , normalized_code_type as code_type
        , replace(normalized_code, '.', '') as code
        , data_source
    from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__procedure') }}

)

, inclusions_diagnosis as (

    select
          patient_conditions.person_id
        , patient_conditions.claim_id
        , patient_conditions.start_date
        , patient_conditions.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_conditions
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_conditions.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'ICD-10-CM'

)

, inclusions_procedure as (

    select
          patient_procedures.person_id
        , patient_procedures.claim_id
        , patient_procedures.start_date
        , patient_procedures.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_procedures
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_procedures.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system in ('ICD-10-PCS', 'HCPCS')

)

/*
    Exclusion logic: Naltrexone NDCs are excluded if there is evidence of an
    alcohol or other drug use disorder where opioid DX is not present

    This CTE excludes medication encounters with the exception codes for
    Naltrexone. Those encounters will be evaluated separately.
*/
, inclusions_medication as (

    select
          patient_medications.person_id
        , patient_medications.claim_id
        , patient_medications.start_date
        , patient_medications.data_source
        , chronic_conditions.chronic_condition_type
        , chronic_conditions.condition_category
        , chronic_conditions.condition
    from patient_medications
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_medications.code = chronic_conditions.code
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'NDC'
    and chronic_conditions.code not in {{ naltrexone_ndcs }}

)

/*
    Exclusion logic: Naltrexone NDCs are excluded if there is evidence of an
    alcohol or other drug use disorder where opioid DX is not present

    This CTE includes patients with evidence of the chronic conditions Alcohol
    Use Disorders or Drug Use Disorders.
*/
, exclusions_other_chronic_conditions as (

    select distinct person_id
    from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_all') }}
    where condition in (
          'Alcohol Use Disorders'
        , 'Drug Use Disorders'
    )

)

/*
    Exclusion logic: Naltrexone NDCs are excluded if there is evidence of an
    alcohol or other drug use disorder where opioid DX is not present

    This CTE creates the exclusion list which consists of patients with
    medication encounters for Naltrexone having Alcohol Use Disorder or Drug
    Use Disorder and missing the Opioid Use Disorder diagnosis codes.
*/
, exclusions_medication as (
    select distinct
          patient_medications.person_id
    from patient_medications
         inner join chronic_conditions
             on patient_medications.code = chronic_conditions.code
         inner join exclusions_other_chronic_conditions
             on patient_medications.person_id = exclusions_other_chronic_conditions.person_id
         left outer join inclusions_diagnosis
             on patient_medications.person_id = inclusions_diagnosis.person_id
    where chronic_conditions.inclusion_type = 'Include'
    and chronic_conditions.code_system = 'NDC'
    and chronic_conditions.code in {{ naltrexone_ndcs }}
    and inclusions_diagnosis.person_id is null

)

{% if target.type == 'fabric' %}
, inclusions_unioned as (

    select * from inclusions_diagnosis
    union
    select * from inclusions_procedure
    union
    select * from inclusions_medication

)
{% else %}
, inclusions_unioned as (

    select * from inclusions_diagnosis
    union distinct
    select * from inclusions_procedure
    union distinct
    select * from inclusions_medication

)
{% endif %}

select distinct
      cast(inclusions_unioned.person_id as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as person_id
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.claim_id as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as claim_id
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.start_date as date) as start_date
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.chronic_condition_type as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as chronic_condition_type
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.condition_category as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as condition_category
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.condition as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as condition
    , cast(inclusions_unioned.data_source as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) as data_source
    , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from inclusions_unioned
     left outer join exclusions_medication
         on inclusions_unioned.person_id = exclusions_medication.person_id
where exclusions_medication.person_id is null

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique ID for the patient.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each claim.

columns.name: start_date
columns.description: Start date of the chronic condition derived from diagnosis, procedure, or medication.

columns.name: chronic_condition_type
columns.description: The type of chronic condition as defined by CMS. ('Common' or 'Other chronic or potentially disabling conditions')

columns.name: condition_category
columns.description: The category of the condition (e.g. Substance Abuse).

columns.name: condition
columns.description: The name of the chronic condition.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: Indicates the name of the source dataset (e.g. Medicare Claims).

nodes.name: chronic_conditions__tuva_chronic_conditions_wide
nodes.description: This model creates one record per patient with flags for all the conditions in the tuva chronic conditions hierarchy. A patient will have a 1 in the column for a certain condition if they have ever been coded with a diagnosis that rolls up to that condition and a 0 if not.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', var('clinical_enabled', False)) | as_bool
   )
}}

with patients as (
select distinct person_id
from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__tuva_chronic_conditions_long') }}
)

, obesity as (
select distinct person_id
from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__tuva_chronic_conditions_long') }}
where condition = 'Obesity'
)


, osteoarthritis as (
select distinct person_id
from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__tuva_chronic_conditions_long') }}
where condition = 'Osteoarthritis'
)

, copd as (

where condition = 'Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease'

select
  person_id
  , case when person_id in (select * from obesity) then 1
       else 0
  end as obesity
  , case when person_id in (select * from osteoarthritis) then 1
       else 0
  end as osteoarthritis
  , case when person_id in (select * from copd) then 1
       else 0
  end as copd
  , case when person_id in (select * from anxiety_disorders) then 1
       else 0
  end as anxiety_disorders
  , case when person_id in (select * from ckd) then 1
       else 0
  end as ckd
  , case when person_id in (select * from t2d) then 1
       else 0
  end as t2d
  , case when person_id in (select * from cll) then 1
       else 0
  end as cll
  , case when person_id in (select * from dysplipidemias) then 1
       else 0
  end as dysplipidemias
  , case when person_id in (select * from hypertension) then 1
       else 0
  end as hypertension
  , case when person_id in (select * from atherosclerosis) then 1
       else 0
  end as atherosclerosis
  , case when person_id in (select * from dementia) then 1
       else 0
  end as dementia
  , case when person_id in (select * from rheumatoid_arthritis) then 1
       else 0
  end as rheumatoid_arthritis
  , case when person_id in (select * from celiac) then 1
       else 0
  end as celiac
  , case when person_id in (select * from hip_fracture) then 1
       else 0
  end as hip_fracture
  , case when person_id in (select * from immunodeficiencies_and_white_blood_cell_disorders) then 1
       else 0
  end as immunodeficiencies_and_white_blood_cell_disorders
  , case when person_id in (select * from asthma) then 1
       else 0
  end as asthma
  , case when person_id in (select * from t1d) then 1
       else 0
  end as t1d
  , case when person_id in (select * from ulcerative_colitis) then 1
       else 0
  end as ulcerative_colitis
  , case when person_id in (select * from chrohns) then 1
       else 0
  end as chrohns
  , case when person_id in (select * from holicobacter) then 1
       else 0
  end as holicobacter
  , case when person_id in (select * from bipolar) then 1
       else 0
  end as bipolar
  , case when person_id in (select * from heart_failure) then 1
       else 0
  end as heart_failure
  , case when person_id in (select * from tabacco) then 1
       else 0
  end as tabacco
  , case when person_id in (select * from lyme) then 1
       else 0
  end as lyme
  , case when person_id in (select * from breast_cancer) then 1
       else 0
  end as breast_cancer
  , case when person_id in (select * from osteoporosis) then 1
       else 0
  end as osteoporosis
  , case when person_id in (select * from pulmonary_embolism) then 1
       else 0
  end as pulmonary_embolism
  , case when person_id in (select * from schizophrenia) then 1
       else 0
  end as schizophrenia
  , case when person_id in (select * from atrial_fibrillation) then 1
       else 0
  end as atrial_fibrillation
  , case when person_id in (select * from colorectal_cancer) then 1
       else 0
  end as colorectal_cancer
  , case when person_id in (select * from depression) then 1
       else 0
  end as depression
  , case when person_id in (select * from deep_vein_thrombosis) then 1
       else 0
  end as deep_vein_thrombosis
  , case when person_id in (select * from alzheimer) then 1
       else 0
  end as alzheimer
  , case when person_id in (select * from stroke) then 1
       else 0
  end as stroke
  , case when person_id in (select * from myocardial_infraction) then 1
       else 0
  end as myocardial_infraction
  , case when person_id in (select * from opiod_use_disorder) then 1
       else 0
  end as opiod_use_disorder
  , case when person_id in (select * from lung_cancer) then 1
       else 0
  end as lung_cancer
  , case when person_id in (select * from herpes) then 1
       else 0
  end as herpes
  , case when person_id in (select * from rickettsiosis) then 1
       else 0
  end as rickettsiosis
  , case when person_id in (select * from ms) then 1
       else 0
  end as ms
  , case when person_id in (select * from alchohol) then 1
       else 0
  end as alchohol
  , case when person_id in (select * from adhd) then 1
       else 0
  end as adhd
  , case when person_id in (select * from hiv) then 1
       else 0
  end as hiv
  , case when person_id in (select * from ptsd) then 1
       else 0
  end as ptsd
  , case when person_id in (select * from lupus) then 1
       else 0
  end as lupus
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run

from patients

nodes.name: chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_long
nodes.description: This model unions condition flags from the 3 upstream stage models that calculate them.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique ID for the patient.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each claim.

columns.name: start_date
columns.description: Start date of the chronic condition derived from diagnosis, procedure, or medication.

columns.name: chronic_condition_type
columns.description: The type of chronic condition as defined by CMS. ('Common' or 'Other chronic or potentially disabling conditions')

columns.name: condition_category
columns.description: The category of the condition (e.g. Cardiovascular Disease).

columns.name: condition
columns.description: The name of the chronic condition.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: Indicates the name of the source dataset (e.g. Medicare Claims).

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The time at which the model was materialized. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_wide
nodes.description: This model pivots conditions on the patient level (i.e. one record per patient) with flags for each chronic condition.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
   )
}}

with chronic_conditions as (

    select distinct
          condition
        , condition_column_name
    from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_hierarchy') }}

)

, conditions as (

    select
          chronic_conditions_unioned.person_id
        , chronic_conditions.condition_column_name
        , 1 as condition_count
    from {{ ref('chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_long') }} as chronic_conditions_unioned
         inner join chronic_conditions as chronic_conditions
             on chronic_conditions_unioned.condition = chronic_conditions.condition

)

select
      p.person_id
    , {{ dbt_utils.pivot(
          column='condition_column_name'
        , values=dbt_utils.get_column_values(
              ref ('chronic_conditions__cms_chronic_conditions_hierarchy')
            , 'condition_column_name'
            , order_by= 'condition_column_name'
          )
        , agg='max'
        , then_value= 1
        , else_value= 0
        , quote_identifiers = False
      ) }}
      , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('cms_chronic_conditions__stg_core__patient') }} as p
     left outer join conditions
        on p.person_id = conditions.person_id
group by
    p.person_id
